channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Israeli doctors say five released Thai hostages in 'fair' health after 15 months of captivity
item.description: BEER YAAKOV, Israel (AP) — When the mother of one of the Thai hostages held in the Gaza Strip for over a year caught sight of her son on a Facebook livestream after his release Thursday, he had changed so much that she didn’t recognize him at first.
item.dc:creator: MELANIE LIDMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — A midair collision between an Army helicopter and a jetliner killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft, officials said, as they scrutinized the actions of the military pilot in the country's deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: A midair collision between an Army helicopter and an American Airlines flight from Kansas has killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Tara Copp And Eric Tucker, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US aid agency is in upheaval during foreign assistance freeze and staff departures
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Trump administration changes have upended the U.S. agency charged with providing humanitarian aid to countries overseas, with dozens of senior officials put on leave, thousands of contractors laid off, and a sweeping freeze imposed on billions of dollars in foreign assistance.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE and ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The DNC's outgoing chair says Democrats should have stuck with Joe Biden in 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the Democratic National Committee prepares to elect a new chair, its departing leader says Democrats should have stuck with Joe Biden in the 2024 race.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about the NTSB and the investigation into the DC plane cash
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people brought renewed focus on the federal agency charged with investigating aviation disasters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Olympian Nancy Kerrigan mourns loss of skating community members after DC plane crash
item.description: “Much like everyone here has been saying is not sure how to process it,” she told MSNBC while in tears on Thursday at the Boston Skating Club.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Engineering student among DC plane crash victims
item.description: DAYTON, Ohio (WDTN) -- Cedarville University is grieving one of its own after the devastating plane crash in Washington D.C. Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Lewis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FBI wrestles with a spike in sexual misconduct claims and male-dominated culture
item.description: An investigation by AP revealed that the incidents ranged from sexual assault to agents paying for sex at massage parlors.
item.dc:creator: Jim Mustian, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina death row inmate maintains his innocence and won't ask for clemency
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — After the U.S. Supreme Court rejected the final appeal of a South Carolina inmate, he decided not to ask the governor for clemency, saying he didn't want to spend the rest of his life in prison for a murder he has always insisted he did not commit. Marion Bowman Jr.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: "We’ll be announcing the tariffs on Canada and Mexico for a number of reasons," Trump told reporters in the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Mid-air collision draws attention to military helicopter training, previous accidents
item.description: To learn to fly a military helicopter is to take a master class in multitasking. You need both hands and both feet to control the aircraft while keeping a close eye on the horizon and your altitude.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and DYLAN LOVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Midwest woman pardoned for Jan. 6 offenses sentenced in deadly drunken-driving crash
item.description: Emily Hernandez, a Missouri woman pardoned after her ties to the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, was sentenced Wednesday in connection with a drunken-driving crash.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Tennessee GOP passes school voucher expansion bill with backing from Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee lawmakers on Thursday approved legislation drastically expanding the number of families who can use taxpayer money on private schools regardless of income, a long-sought victory for Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Aviation expert weighs in on how aircraft crash near DC may have happened
item.description: An aviation expert told Nexstar's WDCW that the altitude of both the passenger plane and Army helicopter may have played a principal role in the aircraft collision near Reagan National Airport (DCA).
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donald Trump talks so much that even his White House stenographers are struggling to keep up
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House stenographers have a problem. Donald Trump is talking so much, the people responsible for transcribing his public remarks are struggling to keep up with all the words.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DC crash ‘almost identical’ to 1949 collision: Aviation expert
item.description: “There was a prior accident at Washington National 75 years ago almost identical to what happened last night.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, KRON4

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: FCC chair launches investigation into NPR, PBS
item.description: The chairman of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) is launching an investigation into NPR and PBS over their alleged "airing of commercials.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LISTEN: Audio captures air traffic control at moment of DC crash
item.description: Audio of air traffic control captured the moment that workers observed a Black Hawk helicopter colliding with a passenger jet near Reagan National Airport on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, KRON4

item.title: Man recovering after allegedly being stabbed by girlfriend's father
item.description: 24-year-old Jonathan Washington was walking home from his girlfriend's house when he was hit by a truck and nearly stabbed to death.
item.dc:creator: Mecca Thompson/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: What to know about military helicopter involved in crash near DC
item.description: A deadly collision on Wednesday night between an American Airlines plane with 60 passengers and four crew and an Army UH-60 Black Hawk with three soldiers remains under investigation amid questions about how the crash occurred.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: Miles-long cluster of dolphins captured on drone video
item.description: A miles-long cluster of dolphins has been filmed leaping and gliding across Carmel Bay off California, forming an unusual “super pod” of more than 1,500 of the marine creatures.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Live updates: White House rescinds funding freeze, RFK Jr. faces tough questions
item.description: President Trump's executive actions, including a freeze on federal grants and a buyout offer to federal employees, have drawn criticism from Democrats and some Republicans, while his pick for HHS Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, ABC 4

item.title: Trump makes moves to expand power, sparking chaos, possible constitutional crisis
item.description: Just a little over a week into his second term, President Donald Trump is taking steps to maximize his power, sparking chaos and what critics contend is a constitutional crisis as he challenges the separation of powers that have defined American government for more than 200 years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Year of the Snake is underway with Lunar New Year festivities in Asia and around the world
item.description: Lunar New Year festivals and prayers marked the start of the Year of the Snake around Asia and farther afield on Wednesday — including in Moscow.
item.dc:creator: KEN MORITSUGU Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Homeland Security secretary joins federal agents to tout immigrant arrests in NYC
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem joined federal agents Tuesday in New York City to announce the arrests of immigrants wanted on criminal charges, including a man accused of kidnapping who was seen on a viral video entering a Colorado apartment with reputed gang members.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man stole car to smuggle migrants in trunk past Border Patrol checkpoint
item.description: A 19-year-old from Houston has been sentenced to three and a half years in federal prison for stealing a car that was used for human smuggling at the South Texas border, Acting U.S. Attorney Jennifer Lowery said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Study says climate change made conditions that fed California wildfires more likely, more intense
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Human-caused climate change increased the likelihood and intensity of the hot, dry and windy conditions that fanned the flames of the recent devastating Southern California wildfires, a scientific study found.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Trump admin's freeze on federal grants, loans
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked a Trump administration freeze on federal grants and loans that could total trillions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Watch a miles-long cluster of dolphins captured on drone video
item.description: A miles-long cluster of dolphins has been filmed leaping and gliding across Carmel Bay off the central coast of California, forming an unusual “super pod” of more than 1,500 of the marine creatures.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A GOP lawsuit to limit people in the US illegally from the census count will be harmful, voters say
item.description: Voters in California and Texas affiliated with a Democratic group want to intervene in a lawsuit filed by four Republican state attorneys general that is attempting to exclude people in the U.S. illegally from numbers used to divvy up congressional seats among states.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sean Duffy is confirmed by the Senate to lead the Transportation Department
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Duffy was confirmed Tuesday as transportation secretary, giving him a key role in helping President Donald Trump cut regulations and fix the nation's infrastructure. The former Wisconsin congressman has promised safer Boeing planes, less regulation and help for U.S.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Prosecutors say woman charged in killing of Border Patrol agent was in contact with homicide suspect
item.description: A Washington state woman charged in connection with the fatal shooting of a U.S. border patrol agent in Vermont had been in frequent contact with someone whom authorities have linked to homicides in Pennsylvania and California, a federal prosecutor said in court documents Monday.
item.dc:creator: HOLLY RAMER, KATHY McCORMACK and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4
